auth.title: Welcome to Wavi
auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage your AI agent, groups, and character settings.
auth.privacyNote: Only you can access your dashboard. We never share your data.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.accessDenied: Access denied. This dashboard is restricted to the owner account.

status.degradedHint: Session is recovering from a browser issue

tooltip.healthyBody: WhatsApp is linked and listening. Wavi will reply when tagged in a registered group.
tooltip.degradedBody: WhatsApp is still connected but the browser hit an issue. Wavi is auto-recovering — replies may be briefly delayed.
tooltip.connectingBody: WhatsApp session is authenticating. This usually takes under 30 seconds.
tooltip.offlineBody: WhatsApp is not linked. Go to Connect and scan the QR code to activate Wavi.

flows.activeCount: {count} reply in progress | {count} replies in progress

subtitle.disconnected: Connect WhatsApp to let Wavi start organizing your chaotic digital life.
subtitle.noGroups: WhatsApp is linked — register a group so Wavi has somewhere witty to work.
subtitle.active: Wavi is live in {count} {groups} and ready to roast.
subtitle.degraded: WhatsApp is linked but the browser is recovering — replies may lag for a moment.

failures.title: {count} failed reply today | {count} failed replies today
failures.body: A reply was generated but never reached the group. Tap to review.

health.title: Session Health
health.offline: WhatsApp is not linked. Connect to see live browser health.
health.degradedNote: Wavi is auto-recovering the WhatsApp browser. Replies may be delayed briefly.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.viewSubtitle: See what Wavi has been up to

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.waOffline: Agent is offline. Head to Connect to scan the QR code.
recentActivity.waOnline: Agent session is connected and listening.
recentActivity.waDegraded: Session is connected but recovering from a browser hiccup.
recentActivity.intelligenceBody: Activity feed will fill up once groups are active. For now, Wavi is sharpening its wit.

breakdown.title: Request breakdown
breakdown.empty: No tracked requests in this period yet.

topGroups.title: Top groups this month
topGroups.empty: No group usage yet this month.

extremes.allTimeNote: Smallest/largest replies are all-time, not filtered by the period above.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Register WhatsApp groups where Wavi should listen and reply
groups.createDraftSubtitle: Prepare history and character before Wavi joins the WhatsApp chat.
groups.draftHint: Draft — not linked to WhatsApp yet

empty.title: No groups registered yet
empty.body: Create a draft to prepare from chat history, or add a group from WhatsApp when Wavi is already in the chat.

discover.title: Add group from WhatsApp
discover.subtitle: Groups your linked WhatsApp account is already in
discover.empty: No group chats found on this WhatsApp account.
discover.connectHint: Make sure WhatsApp is connected under Agent → WhatsApp, and that this account is in at least one group.

groupLink.title: WhatsApp connection
groupLink.draftBody: This group is a draft. Upload history and tune the character now, then link it when Wavi joins the real WhatsApp chat.
groupLink.linkedBody: Wavi listens and replies in this WhatsApp group. Live messages flow in after you go live.
groupLink.unlinkBlocked: Unlink is only available while the group is still in setup.
groupLink.pickerSubtitle: Pick the chat where Wavi is already a member
groupLink.pickerEmpty: No unlinked group chats found. Add Wavi to the group first.

overview.title: Group overview
overview.membersDraft: Link WhatsApp to see member count
overview.membersUnavailable: Connect WhatsApp to load member count

setup.title: Setup
setup.body: Set the group to {live} so Wavi replies when someone tags {mention} in the chat.
setup.linkBeforeLive: Connect this group to WhatsApp before going live.
setup.draftNotice: Go Live is disabled until you connect this draft to a WhatsApp group.

groupSettings.title: Group settings
groupSettings.languageHint: Controls which language Wavi uses for replies and re-sync.
groupSettings.webSearchHint: When enabled, Wavi searches the web for factual or current-info questions (scores, weather, news, etc.). Requires TAVILY_API_KEY on the API.
groupSettings.imageGenerationHint: When enabled, Wavi can generate and send images when members ask for drawings or pictures. Off by default.
groupSettings.deleteHint: Permanently removes this group and all stored messages, profiles, and intelligence. This cannot be undone.
groupSettings.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" and all its data? This cannot be undone.

rebuild.title: Rebuild intelligence
rebuild.body: Regenerate member profiles, relationships, summaries, and character from stored messages — no new upload needed.
rebuild.confirm: This will regenerate member profiles, relationships, and character from stored messages. Your manual name and summary edits are kept unless you choose full reset below.
rebuild.fullResetHint: Full reset — delete all members and relationships first, then rebuild from scratch (removes manual edits and merges).

connect.title: Connect WhatsApp
connect.subtitle: Scan the QR code to link your WhatsApp account to Wavi

connected.title: WhatsApp connected
connected.body: Your agent is linked and ready.

linking.title: Link Wavi to WhatsApp
linking.tagline: Wavi is waiting to roast your friends…

steps.title: How to link
steps.step3: Point your phone at the code to {capture}

status.scan: Scan with your phone to connect

connect.hint: Keep your phone on Wi-Fi for a faster sync. QR refreshes automatically.

errors.timeout: QR code timed out. Check your connection and retry.
errors.apiDown: Could not reach the API. Check Railway logs.
errors.restartFailed: Restart request failed — check Railway logs.

troubleshoot.title: Browser stuck or offline?
troubleshoot.body: If WhatsApp keeps showing as disconnected, restart the browser process. Your session will be preserved — you should see a new QR within a few seconds.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Recent Wavi replies across your registered groups

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Once Wavi starts replying in your groups, you'll see the feed here.

activity.flaggedOnlyTooltipBody: Replies marked as off-base — by you in the dashboard or when Wavi detects a bad response. Use this filter to review them and tune the agent.
activity.flagAsMissTooltipBody: Tell Wavi this reply was off-base. Flagged replies appear under Flagged only so you can review and tune the agent.
activity.revertFlagTooltipBody: Remove the miss mark if this reply was actually fine. It will no longer count as flagged.

empty.title: No failures
empty.body: Every reply Wavi generated reached its group. Delivery or generation errors will show up here.

failed.emptyFilteredBody: No failed replies match this group filter.

liveLog.title: Live Log
liveLog.subtitle: Real-time agent status, in-flight replies, and recent activity

empty.title: Nothing in the log yet
empty.body: Agent status, active replies, and recent responses will show up here as Wavi runs.

status.healthyBody: WhatsApp is linked and listening for tags.
status.healthyWithPhone: Linked to +{phone} and listening for tags.
status.healthyWithHealth: Linked to +{phone}. {cdp} recent CDP failure(s) — auto-recovering if needed.
status.degradedBody: WhatsApp is connected but the browser hit an issue. Replies may lag briefly.
status.offlineBody: WhatsApp is not linked. Connect to start seeing live activity.

character.title: Group character
character.voiceHint: How Wavi talks and their overall personality in this group — auto-generated from chat history.
character.opinionsHint: Short takes Wavi can drop in replies — group inside jokes, hot takes, or recurring themes. Up to 3.
character.signatureHint: One recurring quirk the group would recognize — a habit or how Wavi typically wraps up.
character.signaturePlaceholder: e.g. Signs off with a dry one-liner
character.genderHint: Sets Hebrew grammatical gender for verb and adjective agreement throughout replies.
character.presetsHint: Snap to a starting personality, then fine-tune the sliders.
character.slidersHint: Fine-tune tone. Low end = subtle/casual; high end = intense/expressive.
character.replyModelHint: Haiku is faster and cheaper; Sonnet may improve Hebrew quality.

sliderDesc.formality: Casual slang vs. polished, formal phrasing.
sliderDesc.humor: Straight answers vs. jokes and playful banter.
sliderDesc.verbosity: Short one-liners vs. longer, more detailed replies.
sliderDesc.assertiveness: Hedged and neutral vs. direct and opinionated.
sliderDesc.empathy: Task-focused vs. warm and emotionally attuned.
sliderDesc.emoji_usage: Rarely or never vs. freely peppered in.

ingest.title: Upload chat history
ingest.body: Export your WhatsApp group chat as a {ext} file and upload it to build member profiles, relationship maps, and Wavi's group character.
ingest.dragDrop: Drag & drop a WhatsApp export here, or
ingest.supplementalHint: Optional: also upload an export from another group member's phone — overlapping messages will align names (e.g. "Alon Arroyo" = "אלון").
ingest.fullResetHint: Full reset — wipe all members and relationships before ingesting (removes manual edits and merges). Leave unchecked to refresh while keeping your curation.

members.title: Member profiles
members.empty: Member profiles will appear after uploading chat history
members.activityLevelTooltip: How often this person participates in the group chat, inferred from their message history.
members.recognizedNamesHint: When someone tags Wavi and mentions any of these names, it knows they mean this person.
members.noAliasesYet: No extra names yet — add nicknames, Hebrew spellings, contact labels, etc.
members.confirmResetAliasesSnapshot: Restore {name}'s extra names to what Wavi learned at ingest? Manual adds and removals since then will be undone.
members.confirmResetAliasesRecompute: Re-scan {name}'s messages and rebuild recognized names? This may take a few seconds.
members.confirmClearAliases: Remove all extra names for {name}? Their display name stays the same.
members.confirmRemove: Remove {name} from this group? Dynamics involving them will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

dynamics.title: Group dynamics
dynamics.empty: Group dynamics will appear after uploading chat history

messages.title: Messages
messages.empty: No messages yet. They'll appear here once the group is active or after uploading chat history.

testChat.title: Test Chat
testChat.subtitle: Preview Wavi's replies with full group context — nothing is sent or saved
testChat.previewBanner: Preview only. Messages here are not sent to WhatsApp and are not stored in the database.
testChat.pickGroup: Select a group above to start testing.
testChat.empty: Send a message to see how Wavi would reply.

howItWorks.title: How Wavi Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Architecture, reply flow, replay harness, and what gets analyzed before each reply.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: All scheduled reminders set by group members
reminders.errorFuture: Time must be in the future
reminders.errorSave: Failed to save — please try again

empty.title: No reminders scheduled
empty.body: When group members set reminders with @wavi, they'll appear here.

automations.title: Wake-up automations
automations.hint: Proactive messages Wavi sends on its own to keep the group alive — all AI-generated in character.
automations.silenceHint: When the group has been quiet for too long, Wavi starts a natural conversation.
automations.digestHint: A short in-character summary of what's been happening in the group.
automations.scheduledHint: A recurring in-character post at a set time — optionally guided by a template hint.
automations.templatePlaceholder: e.g. Ask everyone what they're doing this weekend
